title: ORDR-Connect Agent Action
description: Schema for validating agent actions before execution. Every agent output is validated against this schema per CLAUDE.md Rule 9.

sessionId.description: Agent session identifier for tracking and budget enforcement

agentRole.description: Role of the agent executing the action — determines tool allowlist

toolName.description: Name of the tool being invoked — must be in the agent's allowlist

input.description: Validated input parameters for the tool call

confidence.description: Agent confidence score — actions below 0.7 require human review

tenantId.description: Tenant scope — agent cannot access data outside this tenant

customerId.description: Target customer for the action, if applicable

reasoning.description: Agent's reasoning chain — logged for audit trail

isReversible.description: Whether this action can be rolled back — irreversible actions require explicit flagging

humanApproved.description: Whether a human has approved this action (required for financial, PHI, mass communication)

budgetContext.description: Current budget consumption for the agent session

humanApproved.description: Actions below 0.7 confidence MUST have human approval
